This document describes the development and release schedule for Python 3.13. ## Release Manager and Crew. * 3.13 Release Manager: Thomas Wouters. ## Release Schedule. * 3.13.0 alpha 1: Friday, 2023-10-13. * 3.13.0 alpha 2: Wednesday, 2023-11-22. * 3.13.0 alpha 3: Wednesday, 2024-01-17. * 3.13.0 alpha 4: Thursday, 2024-02-15. * 3.13.0 alpha 5: Tuesday, 2024-03-12. * 3.13.0 alpha 6: Tuesday, 2024-04-09. * 3.13.0 beta 2: Wednesday, 2024-06-05. * 3.13.0 candidate 1: Thursday, 2024-08-01. ### Bugfix releases. * 3.13.6: Wednesday, 2025-08-06. * 3.13.16: Tuesday, 2026-10-06 (Final regular bugfix release with binary installers). ### Source-only security fix releases. Around the time of the release of 3.15.0 final, the final 3.13 bugfix update will be released. After that, it is expected that security updates (source only) will be released until 5 years after the release of 3.13.0 final, so until approximately October 2029.", "score": 0.76554126, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.python.org/downloads/release/python-31312/", "title": "Python Release Python 3.13.12", "content": "[\u25bc Close](https://www.python.org/downloads/release/python-31312/#python-network). *   [Community](https://www.python.org/community/).
